w:r.w:t: व्यापार हिसाब — Offline Business Ledger for Indian Traders
Complete Cursor AI Development Prompt • Android (Kotlin) • MVVM + Room + Hilt
Open Cursor AI → New Chat → Paste this entire document as your first message. If Cursor stops mid-way, type: "Continue from where you stopped." Do not skip any section.

You are a senior Android developer. Build a complete, production-ready Android application called Vyapaar Hisaab (व्यापार हिसाब) — an offline udhaar/credit ledger for Indian small traders. Follow every instruction below precisely. Do not skip any section. Generate all files.
Create every file listed below. No placeholder files — all must contain complete, compilable code.
Deep Forest Green — brand, buttons, headers
// res/font/ — Download from Google Fonts and add to project:
// Hindi (Devanagari) renders from system font — no extra font needed
Display Large → Poppins Bold, 36sp — used in splash & home balance
Headline Large → Poppins Bold, 24sp — screen titles
Title Medium → Poppins Medium, 18sp— card titles, customer name
Body Small → Roboto, 13sp — dates, meta info
Label Small → Poppins Medium, 11sp— chips, badges
Build a stunning animated splash screen that establishes the brand. NO Lottie library. Use Android ViewPropertyAnimator + ObjectAnimator + AnimatedVectorDrawable only.
│ "हर उधार का हिसाब, आपकी मुट्ठी में"│ ← 14sp, white 70%, italic
alpha: 1 → 0 200ms → navigate to Onboarding or Home
<!-- 96x96dp vector: white circle with green ₹ symbol inside -->
<!-- Add subtle drop-shadow using layer-list: bottom offset layer in semi-transparent black -->
<!-- The ₹ glyph uses path data (do not use text element — not supported in VectorDrawable) -->
<!-- Animation: apply animated-vector-drawable to rotate coin 360° once on appear -->
→ objectAnimator on rotation: 0 → 360, duration 700ms, interpolator: AccelerateDecelerate
Show only on first launch. Use ViewPager2 + FragmentStateAdapter. Save first-launch flag to DataStore on "Get Started" press.
Shopkeeper at counter handing ledger book to customer
Know exactly who owes you — no more forgotten debts.
Rupee coins stacked with upward arrow chart
See total outstanding, received, and balance at a glance.
Bell with WhatsApp icon and calendar
Auto-remind customers via WhatsApp. Never chase manually.
Language toggle (EN / हिं) visible on ALL pages — top-right corner chip
Dot indicator at bottom (3 dots, green active, grey inactive)
"Get Started / शुरू करें" — large filled green button on page 3 only
Page transition: horizontal slide (default ViewPager2 behavior)
Illustration top 55% of screen — soft green gradient behind illustration
Text bottom 45% — white card rounded top corners 32dp
The home screen is the most critical screen. It must feel like a premium ledger dashboard. Build it with attention to visual weight, spacing, and real-time data.
Two columns using ConstraintLayout: Udhaar Given (left) | Received (right)
Divider line: white 30% alpha between columns
Net Outstanding: Poppins Bold 28sp — color: WHITE if zero, #FFCDD2 (light red) if positive, #C8E6C9 (light green) if received > given
Tap on card: navigates to Summary screen
Icon (48dp Material icon) + Label text below, centered
│ [Avatar: First letter of name — green circle]│
Swipe left → Delete (red bg + trash icon)
SearchView at top — filters customers by name or phone in real-time (Room FTS or local filter on Flow)
Sort options chip row: All | Highest Due | Oldest Entry | Recently Active
Each customer card shows: avatar initial, name, phone, total outstanding badge (color-coded), last transaction date
Swipe left: archive customer (soft delete, not hard delete)
FAB: "Add Customer" — animated entry from bottom-right
Empty state: illustration of empty ledger + "No customers yet. Add your first customer." CTA button
7.2 Add Customer Screen (Bottom Sheet + Full Fragment fallback)
Chip group: "वो देगा" (they owe) | "मैं दूंगा" (I owe)
Save button: fixed at bottom, full-width, green filled MaterialButton. On save: show checkmark AnimatedVectorDrawable → auto-navigate to CustomerDetail.
│ Each item: date | type | amount | note │
Running balance shown after each entry (like a bank statement)
"Mark Settled" button — marks full balance as paid, adds zero-balance transaction
Long press on transaction → context menu: Edit | Delete | Copy
WhatsApp button: opens wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX with pre-filled reminder message (in Hindi + amount)
Large toggle chips: "उधार दिया" (gave credit) | "पैसे मिले" (received payment)
Required. Green for received, Red for gave
Large numeric TextInputLayout — numberDecimal Show ₹ prefix
Default to NOW. Tap to open DateTimePicker (Material)
Horizontal scroll: किराना | कपड़ा | दवा | अनाज | बिजली | अन्य
DatePicker — shown only when type = "उधार दिया"
TextInputLayout — numberDecimal. Shown only for udhaar
A "उधार दिया" (credit given) transaction INCREASES the customer's outstanding balance
A "पैसे मिले" (payment received) transaction DECREASES the balance
Balance can go negative (I owe them) — show with opposite color
If due date is set + interest % is set → auto-compute interest on due date via WorkManager
All amounts stored in paise (Long) internally. Display in ₹ with Indian number format (1,23,456)
On save: show brief bottom Snackbar "Transaction Saved / ✓" with Undo option (5 seconds)
val openingBalance: Long = 0L, // stored in paise
val amountPaise: Long, // amount in paise (₹ * 100)
val category: String = "", // KIRANA | KAPDA | DAWA | ANAJ | BIJLI | OTHER
@Query("SELECT * FROM customers WHERE isActive = 1 ORDER BY updatedAt DESC")
FROM customers c LEFT JOIN transactions t ON c.id=t.customerId
WHERE c.isActive=1 GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY balance DESC""")
@Query("SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE customerId = :id ORDER BY date DESC")
@Query("SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN type='CREDIT_GIVEN' THEN amountPaise ELSE -amountPaise END) FROM transactions WHERE customerId = :id")
@Query("SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE dueDate < :now AND type='CREDIT_GIVEN'")
data class Success(val msg: String) : UiState()
data class Error(val msg: String) : UiState()
// No restart needed — Navigation Component handles recreation
// Show current: "EN" or "हिं" in a chip/button
// Tap: toggle between en and hi
Create res/values/strings.xml (English) AND res/values-hi/strings.xml (Hindi). Every string below must exist in both files.
{name} bhai, aapka {amount} ka hisab baaki hai. Please pay when possible. - Vyapaar Hisaab
{name} भाई, आपका ₹{amount} का हिसाब बाकी है। कृपया जल्द भेजें। - व्यापार हिसाब
Header card: Total Outstanding (₹) | Total Customers | % cleared this month
BarChart (MPAndroidChart): monthly udhaar given vs received — last 6 months
DonutChart: breakdown by category (Kirana, Kapda, etc.)
Top 5 debtors list (sorted by outstanding balance desc)
Export button: generates a summary as PNG using Canvas API → share via WhatsApp / Save to gallery
Show interstitial ad before export begins (AdManager.showInterstitialIfReady)
val udharSet = BarDataSet(udharEntries, "Udhaar Diya / उधार दिया").apply {
val receivedSet = BarDataSet(receivedEntries, "Paisa Mila / पैसे मिले").apply {
Once per export action (not every time)
// ⚠️ Replace with real IDs before Play Store release
override fun onAdLoaded(ad: InterstitialAd) { interstitial = ad }
override fun onAdFailedToLoad(err: LoadAdError) { interstitial = null }
Room → Kotlin Serialization → save to Downloads/
Parse JSON → insert to Room (skip duplicates)
Opens Play Store listing in-app review API
Placeholder for Google Play Billing v6
Version, Made in India, open-source licenses
// PinLockFragment.kt — shown as non-dismissable modal on app open if PIN enabled
// PIN dots: 4 circles, fill as user enters digits
// Wrong PIN: shake animation on dots + "Wrong PIN / गलत PIN" text
// 3 wrong attempts → 30-second lockout timer shown on screen
// Hash PIN with SHA-256 before storing — never store raw PIN
// Biometric option (if hardware available): use BiometricPrompt API
private fun showNotification(title: String, titleHi: String,
val isHindi = /* read from DataStore */ false
// Schedule in TransactionViewModel when dueDate is set:
<!-- AdMob App ID (test) — replace before release -->
Every item in this list must be implemented before the project is considered complete.
Every ViewModel action that writes to DB must emit Loading → Success/Error
Loading: show CircularProgressIndicator in button center (disable button text)
Success: show brief bottom Snackbar (green background) with message
Error: show bottom Snackbar (red background) with retry button
All lists show shimmer loading skeleton while data is being fetched
All lists show empty-state illustration + text when zero records
All fragment transitions: slide from right (enter), slide to left (exit), reverse for back
RecyclerView items: slide-in from bottom with 50ms stagger per item on first load
FAB: scale-up with spring animation (SpringForce) when fragment enters
Amount change in balance card: use CountAnimation (number counts up visually)
Delete swipe: red background with white trash icon revealed on swipe
Checkmark success animation on save: AnimatedVectorDrawable checkmark draw
All monetary amounts formatted with Indian locale: 1,23,456 (not 123,456)
Rupee symbol ₹ always precedes amount with no space: ₹1,500
WhatsApp reminder button uses wa.me deep link (no WhatsApp API needed)
App must work fully offline — zero network calls in any core feature
APK must be < 12MB — do not bundle unnecessary assets
All interactive elements have contentDescription in both languages
Minimum touch target size: 48x48dp for all buttons and icons
Text contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 for all body text
Color never used as the sole indicator (always pair with icon or text)
First launch: no customers → show illustrated empty state with "Add your first customer" CTA
Customer with zero balance → do not show in overdue list
Amount = 0 → show validation error, do not allow saving
Phone number already exists → show warning dialog "Customer with same number exists. Continue?"
App opened from notification → deep-link directly to customer detail
DB migration: always provide fallbackToDestructiveMigration() for v1 (pre-production)
Back button from Home: show "Exit app?" confirmation dialog
Bottom nav hidden on: splash, onboarding, pin_lock, add_customer, add_transaction
Before telling the user the app is complete, verify every item below compiles and runs correctly.
Splash screen: animation sequence plays fully in correct order (3 seconds)
Onboarding: shows on first launch, never again; language toggle works on all 3 pages
Language switch: English ↔ Hindi works instantly on all screens with no restart
Add Customer: form validates, saves to Room, navigates to detail screen
Add Transaction: both types (udhaar diya / paisa mila) save correctly and update balance
Home balance card: shows correct live total outstanding from all customers
Customer detail: running balance correct after each transaction (like bank statement)
Mark Settled: clears outstanding balance, adds settlement transaction record
WhatsApp button: opens WhatsApp with pre-filled message in selected language
WorkManager reminder: fires local notification at due date
AdMob banner: visible on Home and Customer List screens
Interstitial: shown on 5th transaction save and before export
Summary charts: bar chart + donut chart render with real data
PIN lock: enable/disable works; wrong PIN shows shake; lockout after 3 fails
Backup: exports valid JSON to device storage
Restore: imports JSON back into Room correctly
App runs fully offline: no network calls for any feature (AdMob exempted)
Empty states shown on all list screens when no data
Swipe to delete works with undo Snackbar (5 second window)
All fragment transitions animate correctly (slide in/out)
RecyclerView list items animate in on first load (stagger)
App compiles with zero errors and zero warnings
🚀 START BUILDING — Paste this into Cursor AI
Vyapaar Hisaab • व्यापार हिसाब • Made in India 🇮🇳
